content.en:
In order to ensure his absolute safety, Long Fei Dao Ancestor went around several more directions, and erased the traces of his shuttle, and then concealed his aura to open up a small space inside a small star to hide.

In this way, he felt that he should be foolproof and would never be discovered.

"Heal first, and then use that forbidden spirit root flower to improve your cultivation!"

Long Fei Daozu thought to himself.

Soon after, a figure passed by the little star.

This person is Ye Tian.

Ye Tian's divine sense, as usual, probed this little star, and then copied the talent to envelop it, this was his habit.

Originally, he didn't think there was anything to be gained.

But the point is that his copying talent actually detected the existence of a Dao Ancestor.

Judging from the name of the talent, the other party is the Feng family's Long Fei Dao Ancestor.

"I haven't been able to find Long Fei Dao Ancestor, but when I didn't want to look for it, he actually appeared!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

This is too coincidental, what a low probability should be for him to meet Long Fei Dao Ancestor.

And depending on the situation, Long Fei Daozu seems to be injured, and his injuries have not yet recovered.

Even Ye Tian had to say that Long Fei Dao Ancestor was really unlucky!

Ye Tian casually slammed an energy attack on this little star.

Boom!

The stars shattered, and the hidden array arranged by Long Fei Dao Ancestor was also broken, revealing the figure of Long Fei Dao Ancestor.

At this time, Long Fei Dao Ancestor was very angry, he was so hidden in this star, almost inconspicuous, someone even burst the star and exposed him.

But then he looked even angrier.

"Nine Extremes Heavenly King, it's you!"

Long Fei Dao Ancestor was very annoyed.

Although it is rumored that the Nine Extremes Heavenly King and the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor are two people, and these two people have indeed appeared on the same occasion many times, the attack methods of the two are too similar, almost identical.

Therefore, even if the two of them are two people, they have a very close relationship with each other, even brothers.

Therefore, Long Fei Dao Ancestor also hated the Nine Extremes Heavenly King very much.

However, he was so knowledgeable that he did not fight with the Nine Extremes Heavenly King, but ran away quickly.

There was no way, Ye Tian had not fallen behind in the previous battle with the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and his strength was not as good as the Beacon Fire Dao Ancestor.

He believed that the strength of the Nine Extremes Heavenly King should not be weaker than that of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, so he should not be able to kill the Nine Extremes Heavenly King.

What's more, he has not recovered from his injuries yet and needs to be healed as soon as possible.

Once he has finished healing and refined the Forbidden Spirit Root Flower, and his strength has skyrocketed, it is not too late to kill the Nine Extremes Heavenly King again.

"Want to escape?"

Ye Tian sneered.

The forbidden realm unfolded, enveloping this area, suppressing and binding Long Fei Dao Ancestor.

Then, the Bondage Great Thousand Dao Technique, the Ten Directions Void Fixing Technique, was also cast by Ye Tian, once again giving Long Fei Dao Ancestor a layer of restraint.

is different from when he fought with the Beacon Fire Dao Ancestor, at that time, Ye Tiancai was a six-fold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and the binding effect was very bad, but now he is a seven-fold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and his strength is above that of Long Fei Dao Ancestor.

Therefore, under the suppression of the Forbidden Realm and the Ten Directions Void Determination Technique, Long Fei Dao Ancestor had no way to escape.

"Ancient Slashing Technique!"

A silk thread instantly crossed Long Fei Dao Ancestor's body, breaking through his layers of defenses and directly cutting him in two.

This made Long Fei Dao Ancestor, who was already seriously injured, aggravate his injuries again, and even it became a little difficult to heal his injuries.

"Infinite Space Divine Spear!"

Another attack-type Great Thousand Dao Technique was unleashed, piercing the body of Long Fei Dao Ancestor at an incredible speed.

"Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, the Nine Extremes Heavenly King spares his life!"

Long Fei Dao Ancestor was terrified.

Not to mention that he was not injured, even if he was at his peak, he was definitely not a powerful opponent of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor like the Nine Extremes Heavenly King, and the Nine Extremes Heavenly King would have too many Great Thousand Dao Techniques, almost too comprehensive.

Boom!

A mouthful of soul golden bells vibrated in Long Fei Dao Ancestor's soul sea, causing his soul to almost shatter.

Ahh!!!hh

The screams were incessant, and Long Fei Dao Ancestor felt as if his head had been broken.

But no matter how he begged for mercy, Ye Tian would not let him go.

What are you kidding, he is the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, Long Fei Dao Ancestor sent someone to assassinate his son, how could he let Long Fei Dao Ancestor go?

After a while, Long Fei Dao Ancestor's aura was sluggish, his soul was already about to collapse, and his consciousness was almost blurred.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian directly cast the space-time truncation technique, cutting the body of Long Fei Dao Ancestor into multiple pieces and sending it into different time and space.

In this way, Ye Tian slashed Long Fei Dao Ancestor's body in a short time, completely erasing his vitality.

When the vitality of one body by one was annihilated, Long Fei Dao Ancestor completely fell and died.

This is also the first Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor that Ye Tian has killed since he became a Dao Ancestor.

After killing Long Fei Dao Ancestor, Ye Tian began to sort out his belongings.

Long Fei Dao Ancestor was very poor and poor, and he didn't have any good things on his body, only this time he entered the Forbidden Void Realm and found more than 2,000 forbidden strange things.

In this regard, Ye Tian was already very satisfied, after all, the value of 2,000 forbidden and strange objects was extremely huge.

"Hey, this forbidden treasure is ......"

Ye Tian saw that black flower, which was different from the forbidden rules emanating from other forbidden strange things, and when he smelled it, the Dao power all over his body was tumbling, as if he had improved a little.

"Forbidden Spiritual Root !!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

He didn't expect that Long Fei Dao Ancestor still had a forbidden spirit root on his body, and it was a complete forbidden spirit root!

If the grade of this forbidden spirit root is not as good as that forbidden spirit root tree, but the forbidden spirit root tree he obtained is incomplete, so the forbidden spirit root liquid obtained is not much, and the value is definitely not as high as the value of this forbidden spirit root flower.

At this time, Ye Tian finally understood how the injuries on Long Fei Dao Ancestor's body came about!

As a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, if Long Fei Dao Ancestor and other Dao Ancestors were just snatching ordinary forbidden and strange things, they would not be so heavy.

But if it was to snatch the forbidden spirit root, it would be too normal to be so seriously injured.

"Long Fei Dao Ancestor is really a good person, not to mention giving away people's heads, he also specially gave me a forbidden spirit root!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh.

He decided that even if he took revenge on the Feng family in the future, he would be a little merciful and leave them a whole corpse.

Long Fei Dao Ancestor didn't know Ye Tian's thoughts, otherwise he would definitely vomit blood in anger and die.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left here and continued to search for forbidden strange objects.

At present, with his strength, there is no need to be afraid of other Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, unless it is the kind of Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor who is more against the sky, he can't be killed at all.

In a flash, ten days passed.
